shortlist.selection_case: Lowest model tier, fastest wall time, exact required shape after finalist rerun, all core classifications and blockers preserved.
Best concise quality and exact shape; retained as quality-first shadow because it uses the larger gpt-5.4 model and is slower than C05MR.
Most comprehensive original exact-shape candidate; retained as high-confidence fallback but token/wall-time heavier.

decision: Recommend C05MR as primary because quality passed and the quality gap versus C04R is below the 10-point materiality threshold. Retain C04R as the first shadow when quality margin matters more than model-tier cost.
